description: API-first content management systems for decoupled front-end delivery (web, mobile, JAMstack).

entries.name: Contentful
entries.summary: API-first headless CMS with flexible content modeling and a large app/integration marketplace.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for up to 5 users, 25k records, 2 locales.

entries.name: Sanity
entries.summary: Structured content platform with a real-time collaborative editor and a highly customizable Studio UI.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with 3 users, 10k documents, 5GB assets.

entries.name: Strapi
entries.summary: Open-source, self-hostable Node.js headless CMS with a fully customizable admin panel and REST/GraphQL APIs.
entries.paidFrom: Strapi Cloud from $15/month for managed hosting.

entries.name: Prismic
entries.summary: Headless CMS with a visual page builder (Slice Machine) for marketing teams and developers together.
entries.freeTier: Community plan: 1 user, unlimited API calls, documents, and custom types.

entries.name: Kontent.ai
entries.summary: Content-as-a-Service platform balancing headless CMS benefits with marketer-friendly authoring tools.
entries.freeTier: Developer plan: 2 users, unlimited projects, 2 environments each, 500 content items, 2 languages.
entries.paidFrom: Business plan billed annually, custom pricing.

entries.name: Directus
entries.summary: Open-source data platform that wraps any SQL database with a REST/GraphQL API and admin app instantly.
entries.freeTier: Fully free and open source, self-hosted.
entries.paidFrom: Directus Cloud from $15/month for managed hosting.

entries.name: Forestry.io
entries.summary: Git-based headless CMS giving content editors a friendly UI over markdown content in a Git repo.
entries.freeTier: Free for up to 3 sites, 3 editors, with instant previews.

entries.name: Builder.io
entries.summary: Visual headless CMS and drag-and-drop page builder that integrates with React, Vue, and other frameworks.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for individuals with limited monthly sessions/seats.
